subject: Your Complaint Has Been Reviewed — CMP-OUT-1774022522138-5353ce3
emailBody:
Dear Keshav Sharma,

Thank you for contacting Consumer Electronics Customer Support regarding your
Samsung Bespoke 653L Side-by-Side Refrigerator (Complaint Reference: CMP-OUT-1774022522138-5353ce3).

We have carefully reviewed your complaint. Unfortunately, we are unable to process
this complaint through our current channel for the following reason:

  Reason: The product described does not fall within our supported consumer
  electronics product categories.

Our complaint resolution service covers smartphones, laptops, tablets, earbuds,
smartwatches, and cameras. For other product types, please contact the relevant
manufacturer or retailer directly.

If you believe your product falls within our supported categories and this
decision has been made in error, please reply within 14 days with your product
model and serial number and we will be happy to re-evaluate.

We apologise for any inconvenience caused.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics

emailBody:

Dear Emily Johnson,

RE: Complaint Decision – Reference CMP-ING-1773423500615-dd94df7

Thank you for contacting Consumer Electronics Customer Support regarding your NovaTech SlimTab 10 Tablet.

After reviewing your complaint, we were unable to locate a matching customer record in our system. As a result, we are unable to process your complaint at this time.

REASON
  Your complaint could not be verified against our customer records.

YOUR OPTIONS
  1. If you believe this is an error, please reply with your customer ID or order reference.
  2. For new customer registration, please visit our website.

We apologise for any inconvenience.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics

subject: Your Complaint Has Been Reviewed — CMP-ING-1773853334959-95995ca
emailBody:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for contacting Consumer Electronics Customer Support.

We have received a complaint submission (Reference: CMP-ING-1773853334959-95995ca), however we were
unable to locate a matching customer account in our system.

To process your complaint, we require a verified account with us. Please:

  1. Verify your customer reference number (format: CUST#####) and reply with it, or
  2. Contact us directly so we can locate your account:
       Email: support@electronics.com
       Phone: 1-800-ELEC-HELP  (Monday – Friday, 9am – 6pm)
  3. If you are a new customer, please register at our support portal before
     submitting a complaint.

We apologise for the inconvenience and look forward to resolving this for you.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics

subject: Your Complaint Has Been Approved — CMP-ING-1773853328013-6db9ce0
emailBody:
Dear Ananya Sharma,

We have good news regarding your complaint (Reference: CMP-ING-1773853328013-6db9ce0) about your
NovaTech ProMax X15 Smartphone.

After reviewing the details of your case, we are pleased to confirm that your
complaint has been approved and we will be arranging a repair for you.

What happens next:
  1. Our technical team will contact you within 48 hours to arrange the repair.
  2. Please have your product and proof of purchase ready.
  3. If a courier collection is required, we will arrange this at no cost to you.

Please keep this email for your records and quote your reference number
(CMP-ING-1773853328013-6db9ce0) in any future correspondence.

If you have any questions at any point during this process, our team is here to help:
  Email: support@electronics.com
  Phone: 1-800-ELEC-HELP  (Monday – Friday, 9am – 6pm)

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We are sorry for the inconvenience
caused and look forward to getting this resolved for you promptly.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics
